case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARTA L RAMOS LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $826.01 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, MARTA L RAMOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED NOV-12-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, MARTA L RAMOS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARTA L. RAMOS LOPEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
